title: cifs-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7.2-1]
- resolves: RHEL-82680 - Update to version 7.2

[7.1-2]
- Fix damaged test filename

[7.1-1]
- resolves: RHEL-61732 - Update to version 7.1

[7.0-5]
- Implement CLDAP Ping to find the closest site
- Resolves: RHELPLAN-17597

[7.0-4]
- mount.cifs.rst: add missing reference for sssd
- mount.cifs.rst: update section about xattr/acl support
- Resolves: RHEL-22495

[7.0-3]
- pam_cifscreds: fix NULL arg warning passed to pam_syslog()
- Resolves: RHEL-28050

[7.0-2]
- cifs.upcall: fix UAF in get_cachename_from_process_env()
- Resolves: RHEL-28047
full_text:
[7.2-1]
- resolves: RHEL-82680 - Update to version 7.2

[7.1-2]
- Fix damaged test filename

[7.1-1]
- resolves: RHEL-61732 - Update to version 7.1

[7.0-5]
- Implement CLDAP Ping to find the closest site
- Resolves: RHELPLAN-17597

[7.0-4]
- mount.cifs.rst: add missing reference for sssd
- mount.cifs.rst: update section about xattr/acl support
- Resolves: RHEL-22495

[7.0-3]
- pam_cifscreds: fix NULL arg warning passed to pam_syslog()
- Resolves: RHEL-28050

[7.0-2]
- cifs.upcall: fix UAF in get_cachename_from_process_env()
- Resolves: RHEL-28047

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20526-0.html
